_publications._publicationTitle: Neural Crest-Specific TSC1 Deletion in Mice Leads to Sclerotic Craniofacial Bone Lesion.

_contextSnippet: We observed a dramatic increase in proliferation in the periosteum of the frontal bones of one-week-old CKO mice...we did not find an alteration of proliferation at one month of age
details: Successfully detected dramatic increase in proliferation in periosteum of frontal bones in one-week-old CKO mice, but no alteration at one month of age
